tasks.label: 启动服务
tasks.command: lsof -i :5173 | awk 'NR>1 {print $2}' | sort -u | xargs kill 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; cd ${workspaceFolder} && npm run dev; echo '服务已启动'

tasks.label: 停止服务
tasks.command: lsof -i :5173 | awk 'NR>1 {print $2}' | sort -u | xargs kill 2>/dev/null; echo '服务已停止'

tasks.label: 重启服务
tasks.command: lsof -i :5173 | awk 'NR>1 {print $2}' | sort -u | xargs kill 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; cd ${workspaceFolder} && npm run dev; echo '服务已重启'
